mapper.insert: insert into auction_bid_persistence_log ( event_id, request_id, room_id, user_id, amount, status, attempt_count, last_error, payload_json, created_at, updated_at, persisted_at ) values ( #{eventId}, #{requestId}, #{roomId}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{attemptCount}, #{lastError}, #{payloadJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{persistedAt} )
mapper.select: select event_id, request_id, room_id, user_id, amount, status, attempt_count, last_error, payload_json, created_at, updated_at, persisted_at from auction_bid_persistence_log where status in ('QUEUED', 'FAILED', 'FALLBACK_DIRECT') or (status = 'PROCESSING' and updated_at < #{staleBefore}) order by updated_at asc limit #{limit}
